misc: Bags Miura irons and is rumoured to sleep with them.
biography: Miso, representing Hirsala Golf, has been a steadfast presence at the Hector Trophée, participating in ten past editions of this celebrated team event. His journey through a decade of competition has cemented his position as a committed and respected figure within the tournament's challenging landscape.

In his extensive involvement, Miso has achieved significant team success, guiding his pairing to claim the formidable Hector Trophée on one memorable occasion. While the singular honor of the Victor Trophy has thus far eluded him, this team triumph stands as a testament to his collaborative skill and strategic acumen within the pair format.

A true connoisseur of golf equipment, Miso is renowned for his unwavering loyalty to Miura irons. Such is his profound devotion to these precision instruments that a playful legend among his peers suggests they accompany him even in slumber. This deep affinity for finely crafted tools perfectly reflects his own detailed and thoughtful approach to the nuanced art of golf.

Though Miso will, regrettably, not be on the greens for the Hector Trophée 2026, his continued engagement with the broader Hector community assures that his journey within these events remains vibrant. His enduring passion for the game keeps alive the anticipation of his return to this prestigious stage in future editions.
